            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = strategic_airlifter }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            }
            set_technology = { strategic_airlifter = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_new_order = 1 }
        }
    }

            set_technology = { nuclear_reactor = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_new_order = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { nuclear_reactor_heavy_water = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_new_order = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            }

                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { SRBM = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_new_order = 1 }
        }
    }

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_new_order = 1 }
        }
    }
}

        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1936_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1939_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1940_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
